name: croc-transfer
title: Croc Transfer
description: Send and receive files securely using croc
author: wilton

commands.name: send-file
commands.title: Send File
commands.subtitle: croc
commands.description: Send files or folders to another computer via croc

commands.name: receive-file
commands.title: Receive File
commands.subtitle: croc
commands.description: Receive files by entering a croc code phrase

commands.name: transfer-history
commands.title: Transfer History
commands.subtitle: croc
commands.description: View past croc transfers and re-send files

commands.name: quick-send
commands.title: Quick Send
commands.subtitle: croc
commands.description: Send selected Finder files via croc without opening a window

preferences.name: crocPath
preferences.title: croc Binary Path
preferences.description: Path to the croc binary. Leave empty to auto-detect.

preferences.name: downloadDirectory
preferences.title: Download Directory
preferences.description: Directory where received files are saved. Files are placed directly in this folder.

preferences.name: autoAccept
preferences.title: Auto Accept
preferences.description: Automatically accept incoming files without confirmation.
preferences.label: Auto-accept incoming transfers

preferences.name: customRelay
preferences.title: Custom Relay Server
preferences.description: Custom relay server address. Leave empty to use the default.
